name: Tung Tung Tung  Sahur Vs Zomby
description: The Italian Brainrots are in danger! Evil zombies have invaded their world and captured all the legendary meme heroes. Only Tung Tung Tung Sahur can save them! Launch Tung like a slingshot, smash through obstacles, defeat hordes of silly zombies, and rescue every trapped Brainrot character. Use precise shots, powerful ricochets, and clever strategies to clear challenging levels inspired by classic physics-based games. Can you free all the Italian Brainrots from the clutches of the Zomby army and become the ultimate Sahur hero?
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
